label: Pigmentation (skin, eye, hair) & photo-response
description: Reviewed, frozen list of EFO/OBA/MONDO root traits pulled WITH child traits from the NHGRI-EBI GWAS Catalog download endpoint. Each root names an umbrella concept (its leaf traits come along via includeChildTraits=true), so this is a small auditable list, not a hardcoded gene list. Edit `roots` to change what is queried; the pull then fails loud if a new mapped trait appears under a root that has not been reviewed. Skin/photo-response roots were discovered 2026-06-25; eye + hair color roots added 2026-07-06 to broaden the atlas to full pigmentation (HIrisPlex-S scope: skin + eye + hair). Notes carry an association-row count as a sanity baseline.

EFO_0021835.label: melanin measurement
EFO_0021835.note: marginal ~1; mostly rolls up under skin pigmentation

EFO_0009764.label: eye colour measurement
EFO_0009764.note: eye pigmentation, measurement node; overlaps eye color (~158)

EFO_0003924.label: hair color
EFO_0003924.note: hair pigmentation; MC1R red-hair, KITLG blonde, OCA2 (~435)
